name: developer_necropolis_mitigation_housing_project
premise: Developer COO Alex Nguyen learns overnight ground-penetrating radar likely found unmarked graves under Block C of a mixed-income housing project where foundations pour Monday. City planner Mayor Leon Ellis privately asks Patricia to delay disclosure until bond closing Tuesday to avoid investor flight that kills affordable units. Immediate disclosure halts construction and triggers state burial law reviews that could take years. Silence risks desecration charges if pour proceeds. Stakeholders are split, and the decision must be justified in writing under a tight deadline with incomplete information. External scrutiny from regulators and community observers has intensified because the outcome could redefine expectations in Urban Planning. The dilemma is widely framed as a truth vs loyalty tradeoff under incomplete information and tightening deadlines that discourage indefinite delay.

agents.name: Alex Nguyen
agents.identity: I am the developer chief operating officer accountable to investors, affordable housing commitments, and corporate ethics policies after radar anomalies. I know that whichever policy I choose will be scrutinized after the fact as if the risk had been obvious.
agents.goal: I want unhoused families housed without burying forensic truth about what lies under Block C. I need a choice that is defensible if the worst case happens, not just the most convenient today.

agents.name: Leon Ellis
agents.identity: I am the mayor balancing bond timing, affordable housing optics, and archaeological stewardship laws that could freeze the whole district. I know that whichever policy I choose will be scrutinized after the fact as if the risk had been obvious.
agents.goal: I want a short coordinated delay for private investor conversations before public disclosure to preserve financing for the affordable stack. I need a choice that is defensible if the worst case happens, not just the most convenient today.

choices: I will issue immediate public disclosure and halt pours pending state burial review, accepting bond collapse risk and possible loss of the affordable financing stack.
I will privately commission a rapid forensic exhumation assessment over the weekend and disclose only if human remains are confirmed, accepting legal exposure if radar was right and pour moved soil.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Concrete trucks are idling with crews on overtime. Alex Nguyen must choose between immediate public disclosure with halt or a private weekend assessment before disclosure. What does Alex Nguyen do?
